funFactZh: 白腹海雕是新加坡最大的猛禽，翼展可达2米！它们常在双溪布洛湿地保护区上空翱翔。
funFactEn: The White-bellied Sea Eagle is Singapore's largest raptor with a 2-metre wingspan! They soar above Sungei Buloh Wetland Reserve.

funFactZh: 白领翡翠不只吃鱼！它们还会捕食螃蟹、蜥蜴甚至小蛇，是乌敏岛上的全能猎手。
funFactEn: Collared Kingfishers don't just eat fish! They also hunt crabs, lizards, and even small snakes — versatile hunters of Pulau Ubin.

funFactZh: 丹顶鹤是世界上最优雅的鸟之一！它们会跳美丽的求偶舞蹈，在日本被视为长寿的象征。
funFactEn: Red-crowned Cranes are among the world's most elegant birds! They perform beautiful courtship dances and symbolize longevity in Japan.

funFactZh: 鸳鸯是爱情的象征！雄鸟有着世界上最华丽的羽毛，像穿着彩色的礼服。
funFactEn: Mandarin Ducks symbolize love! Males have some of the most spectacular plumage in the world, like wearing a colorful tuxedo.

funFactZh: 大犀鸟头上有一个巨大的盔突！它们飞行时翅膀发出的声音像火车一样响亮。
funFactEn: Great Hornbills have a massive casque on their head! Their wingbeats are so loud they sound like a train approaching.

funFactZh: 棕尾虹雉是尼泊尔的国鸟！它的羽毛像彩虹一样闪耀，在阳光下会变换颜色。
funFactEn: The Himalayan Monal is Nepal's national bird! Its feathers shimmer like a rainbow, changing colors in sunlight.

funFactZh: 印度孔雀是印度的国鸟！雄孔雀展开尾羽时有超过200只'眼睛'图案，是自然界最壮观的展示之一。
funFactEn: The Indian Peafowl is India's national bird! When males fan their tail, over 200 'eye' patterns create one of nature's most spectacular displays.

funFactZh: 欧亚鸲是英国的国鸟！它们全年都会歌唱，甚至在路灯下的夜晚也不停歇。
funFactEn: The European Robin is Britain's national bird! They sing all year round, even at night under street lights.

funFactZh: 大西洋海鹦可以同时叼住十几条小鱼！它们色彩鲜艳的喙在繁殖季节会变得更加明亮。
funFactEn: Atlantic Puffins can hold over a dozen fish in their beak at once! Their colourful bill becomes even brighter during breeding season.

funFactZh: 紫胸佛法僧是肯尼亚的国鸟！它身上有多达8种颜色，是非洲最美丽的鸟之一。
funFactEn: The Lilac-breasted Roller is Kenya's national bird! It has up to 8 colours on its body — one of Africa's most beautiful birds.

funFactZh: 蛇鹫用强壮的长腿踩踏猎物！它们一天可以走20公里来寻找蛇和蜥蜴。
funFactEn: Secretary Birds stomp their prey with powerful long legs! They can walk 20 km a day hunting snakes and lizards.

funFactZh: 非洲灰鹦鹉是世界上最聪明的鸟之一！它们能学会超过1000个单词，还能理解颜色和形状。
funFactEn: African Grey Parrots are among the smartest birds! They can learn over 1,000 words and understand colors and shapes.

funFactZh: 鲸头鹳有一张像鞋子一样的大嘴巴！它们可以一动不动地站几个小时等待猎物。
funFactEn: Shoebills have a massive shoe-shaped bill! They can stand motionless for hours waiting for prey to come close.

funFactZh: 非洲秃鹳是非洲最大的飞行鸟之一！它们的翼展可达3.7米，比一辆小汽车还宽。
funFactEn: Marabou Storks are among Africa's largest flying birds! Their wingspan can reach 3.7 metres — wider than a small car.

funFactZh: 白头海雕是美国的国鸟！它们的巢可以重达1吨，是世界上最大的鸟巢之一。
funFactEn: The Bald Eagle is America's national bird! Their nests can weigh up to 1 tonne — among the largest bird nests in the world.

funFactZh: 雪鸮是少数能在北极生存的猫头鹰！它们纯白的羽毛是完美的雪地伪装。
funFactEn: Snowy Owls are among the few owls that thrive in the Arctic! Their pure white feathers provide perfect camouflage in snow.

funFactZh: 游隼是世界上飞得最快的动物！俯冲时速可达390公里，比高铁还快！
funFactEn: Peregrine Falcons are the fastest animals on Earth! They can dive at 390 km/h — faster than a bullet train!

funFactZh: 加拿大雁飞行时排成V字形！这样可以节省能量，后面的雁可以借助前面雁的气流。
funFactEn: Canada Geese fly in a V-formation! This saves energy — birds behind can ride the air currents created by those in front.

funFactZh: 加州神鹫曾经几乎灭绝！1987年只剩下22只，现在通过保护已经恢复到500多只。
funFactEn: California Condors nearly went extinct! Only 22 remained in 1987, but conservation efforts have brought them back to over 500.

funFactZh: 北方红雀是少数雌雄都会唱歌的鸟类之一！雄鸟鲜红如火，非常容易辨认。
funFactEn: Northern Cardinals are one of the few species where both males and females sing! The bright red male is unmistakable.

funFactZh: 安第斯神鹫翼展可达3.3米，是世界上最大的飞行鸟类之一！它们可以不扇翅膀滑翔数小时。
funFactEn: The Andean Condor has a wingspan of up to 3.3 metres — one of the world's largest flying birds! They can soar for hours without flapping.

funFactZh: 角雕是世界上最强壮的鹰！它的爪子和灰熊的爪子一样大，可以抓起一只猴子。
funFactEn: Harpy Eagles are the world's most powerful eagles! Their talons are as large as a grizzly bear's claws and can snatch monkeys from trees.

pinyin: fēi hóng jīn gāng yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 绯红金刚鹦鹉可以活到75岁！它们鲜艳的红、黄、蓝羽毛让它们成为热带雨林中最耀眼的鸟。
funFactEn: Scarlet Macaws can live up to 75 years! Their vivid red, yellow, and blue feathers make them the most dazzling birds in the rainforest.

funFactZh: 麝雉是一种非常古老的鸟！它的幼鸟翅膀上有爪子，可以像小恐龙一样爬树。
funFactEn: Hoatzins are ancient birds! Their chicks have claws on their wings and can climb trees like little dinosaurs.

funFactZh: 巨嘴鸟的大嘴巴其实很轻！它由中空的骨骼组成，帮助调节体温。
funFactEn: The Toco Toucan's huge bill is actually very light! It's made of hollow bone and helps regulate body temperature.

funFactZh: 笑翠鸟的叫声听起来像人在大笑！它们每天早晨用笑声宣布自己的领地。
funFactEn: Kookaburras sound like they're laughing! They announce their territory each morning with their famous laughing call.

funFactZh: 鹤鸵是世界上最危险的鸟！它们不会飞，但跑得很快，脚上有锋利的爪子像匕首。
funFactEn: Cassowaries are the world's most dangerous birds! They can't fly but run fast, with dagger-like claws on their feet.

funFactZh: 几维鸟是新西兰的国鸟！它们不会飞，鼻孔长在喙的尖端，是唯一这样的鸟类。
funFactEn: Kiwis are New Zealand's national bird! They can't fly and have nostrils at the tip of their beak — the only birds to do so.

pinyin: kuí huā fèng tóu yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 葵花凤头鹦鹉非常聪明！它们会自己打开垃圾桶的盖子找食物，还会教其他鹦鹉这个技能。
funFactEn: Sulphur-crested Cockatoos are incredibly smart! They learned to open bin lids for food and even teach other cockatoos the trick.

pinyin: huī lán xì wěi liáo yīng
funFactZh: 辉蓝细尾鹩莺的雄鸟在繁殖季节会变成耀眼的蓝色！它们会摘花送给雌鸟求偶。
funFactEn: Male Superb Fairywrens turn brilliant blue during breeding season! They even pick flowers to present to females during courtship.

funFactZh: 帝企鹅是世界上最高的企鹅，身高可达1.2米！爸爸企鹅会在零下60度的严寒中孵蛋两个月。
funFactEn: Emperor Penguins are the tallest penguins at up to 1.2 metres! Dads incubate eggs for 2 months in temperatures down to -60°C.

funFactZh: 漂泊信天翁拥有世界上最大的翼展，可达3.5米！它们可以在海上飞行数年不着陆。
funFactEn: Wandering Albatrosses have the largest wingspan of any bird — up to 3.5 metres! They can fly over the ocean for years without landing.

funFactZh: 北极燕鸥是世界上迁徙距离最长的鸟！它们每年从北极飞到南极再飞回来，一生飞行距离相当于往返月球三次。
funFactEn: Arctic Terns have the longest migration of any bird! They fly from Arctic to Antarctic and back each year — a lifetime distance equal to 3 trips to the Moon and back.

funFactZh: 凤尾绿咬鹃是玛雅文明的神圣之鸟！雄鸟有超过60厘米长的尾羽，像翡翠色的飘带。
funFactEn: The Resplendent Quetzal was sacred to the Maya! Males have tail feathers over 60 cm long, like emerald streamers.

funFactZh: 蓝脚鲣鸟用它们鲜艳的蓝色脚来吸引伴侣！脚越蓝，说明越健康。
funFactEn: Blue-footed Boobies use their bright blue feet to attract mates! The bluer the feet, the healthier the bird.

funFactZh: 大火烈鸟的粉红色来自它们吃的虾和藻类！刚出生的小火烈鸟其实是灰色的。
funFactEn: Greater Flamingos get their pink color from the shrimp and algae they eat! Baby flamingos are actually born grey.

funFactZh: 金雕是北半球最强大的猛禽之一！它们的俯冲速度可达320公里每小时。
funFactEn: Golden Eagles are among the most powerful raptors in the Northern Hemisphere! They can dive at speeds up to 320 km/h.

funFactZh: 仓鸮的脸像一个心形的雷达天线！它们可以在完全黑暗中靠听觉捕捉猎物。
funFactEn: A Barn Owl's face works like a heart-shaped radar dish! They can catch prey in total darkness using only their hearing.

funFactZh: 鸵鸟是世界上最大的鸟！虽然不会飞，但它们跑得比马还快，时速可达70公里。
funFactEn: Ostriches are the world's largest birds! They can't fly but run faster than horses — up to 70 km/h.

funFactZh: 鸸鹋是澳大利亚的国鸟！它们是世界上第二大的鸟，而且爸爸负责孵蛋和照顾小鸟。
funFactEn: Emus are Australia's national bird! They're the world's second-largest bird, and dads are responsible for incubating eggs and raising chicks.

funFactZh: 鸮鹦鹉是世界上唯一不会飞的鹦鹉！它们是夜行性的，全世界只剩下约250只。
funFactEn: Kakapos are the world's only flightless parrots! They're nocturnal and critically endangered — only about 250 remain worldwide.

funFactZh: 华丽军舰鸟的雄鸟有一个鲜红色的喉囊，求偶时会像气球一样膨胀起来！
funFactEn: Male Magnificent Frigatebirds have a bright red throat pouch that inflates like a balloon during courtship!

funFactZh: 王企鹅是第二大的企鹅！它们可以潜到300米深的海里捕鱼，一次能屏住呼吸5分钟。
funFactEn: King Penguins are the second-largest penguins! They can dive 300 metres deep to catch fish, holding their breath for 5 minutes.

funFactZh: 家燕每年从欧洲飞到非洲过冬，往返距离超过2万公里！它们能在飞行中捕捉昆虫。
funFactEn: Barn Swallows migrate from Europe to Africa each year — over 20,000 km round trip! They catch insects while flying.

funFactZh: 斑尾塍鹬创造了不间断飞行的世界纪录！它们可以连续飞行11天，从阿拉斯加到新西兰，不吃不喝不休息。
funFactEn: Bar-tailed Godwits hold the record for longest non-stop flight! They fly 11 days straight from Alaska to New Zealand without eating, drinking, or resting.

funFactZh: 雪鹭会用金黄色的脚在水中搅动来吸引鱼类！它们曾因美丽的羽毛差点被猎杀灭绝。
funFactEn: Snowy Egrets wiggle their golden feet in water to attract fish! They were nearly hunted to extinction for their beautiful plumes.

funFactZh: 红喉蜂鸟每秒钟可以拍打翅膀53次！它们是唯一能向后飞行的鸟类，体重只有一枚硬币那么重。
funFactEn: Ruby-throated Hummingbirds beat their wings 53 times per second! They're the only birds that can fly backwards, and weigh less than a coin.

pinyin: jiā lā pà gē sī qǐ é
funFactZh: 加拉帕戈斯企鹅是唯一生活在赤道以北的企鹅！它们是世界上最稀有的企鹅之一。
funFactEn: Galápagos Penguins are the only penguins found north of the equator! They're among the rarest penguins in the world.

funFactZh: 华丽琴鸟是自然界最厉害的模仿者！它们可以模仿电锯、汽车警报器甚至相机快门的声音。
funFactEn: Superb Lyrebirds are nature's greatest mimics! They can imitate chainsaws, car alarms, and even camera shutters.

funFactZh: 白鹳是欧洲最受欢迎的鸟之一！传说中它们会给家庭带来好运和新生的婴儿。
funFactEn: White Storks are among Europe's most beloved birds! Legend says they bring good luck and deliver babies to families.

pinyin: jù zuǐ nǐ zhuó mù niǎo
funFactZh: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟有着彩虹般的羽毛！它们是少数会合作筑巢的鸟类，一家人住在同一个树洞里。
funFactEn: Toucan Barbets have rainbow-colored plumage! They're among the few birds that nest cooperatively — the whole family shares one tree hole.

funFactZh: 非洲鱼鹰的叫声是非洲最具标志性的声音之一！它们可以在飞行中从水面抓起2公斤重的鱼。
funFactEn: The African Fish Eagle's call is one of Africa's most iconic sounds! They can snatch fish weighing up to 2 kg from the water while flying.

funFactZh: 美洲鹤是北美最高的鸟类，站立时可达1.5米！它们曾濒临灭绝，仅剩21只，如今通过保护已恢复到800多只。
funFactEn: The Whooping Crane is the tallest bird in North America, standing up to 1.5 metres! They nearly went extinct with only 21 left, but conservation efforts have brought their numbers back to over 800.

pinyin: zǐ lán jīn gāng yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 紫蓝金刚鹦鹉是世界上最大的飞行鹦鹉，舌头有粗糙的边，像小刷子一样用来剥开坚硬的棕榈果！
funFactEn: The Hyacinth Macaw is the world's largest flying parrot! Its tongue has a rough edge like a tiny brush to peel tough palm nuts.

funFactZh: 裸颈鹳是美洲最高的飞鸟之一，红色的脖子像围了一条鲜艳的围巾，在湿地里特别显眼！
funFactEn: The Jabiru is one of the tallest flying birds in the Americas — its red neck looks like a bright scarf above the wetlands!

funFactZh: 南美麦鸡翅膀下藏着尖尖的距，遇到危险时会张开翅膀大声叫，像在保护自己的地盘小卫士！
funFactEn: Southern Lapwings hide sharp spurs under their wings — when danger comes they spread their wings and shout like tiny territory guards!

pinyin: lán é yà mǎ xùn yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 这种鹦鹉额头有一抹亮蓝色，像戴了小皇冠；它们会用脚抓着食物吃，动作特别灵巧！
funFactEn: This parrot wears a bright blue “crown” on its forehead and eats by holding food with a foot — super clever with its toes!

pinyin: lì ěr ā lā kǎ tuǒ kōng
funFactZh: 阿拉卡鵎鵼的喙又大又彩色，但其实很轻，里面是空心的骨头，像一件漂亮的“塑料玩具”！
funFactEn: The aracari's big rainbow bill looks heavy but is light as a toy — it's hollow bone painted by nature!

funFactZh: 安第斯红鹳站在高海拔盐湖里，用特殊的嘴滤食小虾；它们有时会头朝下觅食，姿势特别有趣！
funFactEn: Andean Flamingos filter tiny shrimp in high mountain salt lakes — sometimes they feed with their heads upside down!

funFactZh: 大美洲鸵不会飞，但跑得飞快；雄鸟会孵蛋并照顾许多小鸟，是超级奶爸！
funFactEn: Greater Rheas can't fly but can sprint fast — dads incubate the eggs and care for many chicks!

funFactZh: 黑颈天鹅宝宝会骑在爸爸妈妈的背上“搭便车”，像坐着水上出租车穿过芦苇丛！
funFactEn: Cygnets sometimes hitch a ride on a parent's back — like a water taxi through the reeds!

pinyin: ān dì sī dòng guān sǎn niǎo
funFactZh: 雄鸟有一顶橙红色的“爆炸头”，在求偶时会跳来跳去，像在森林里开小型舞会！
funFactEn: Males have a fiery orange “mohawk” and bounce in courtship — like a tiny forest dance party!

funFactZh: 雄鸟胸前像贴了一块亮红色的小毯子，会从树枝上突然飞出捕捉飞虫，动作又快又准！
funFactEn: Males wear a bright red “bib” and dart from perches to snatch flying insects in mid-air!

funFactZh: 大林鸱白天紧紧贴在树干上装成一段枯木，大眼睛闭成细缝，连猎人都很难发现它！
funFactEn: By day the Great Potoo freezes against a trunk like broken wood — with squinted eyes it's nearly invisible!

funFactZh: 剑嘴蜂鸟的喙比身体还长，专门吸食深筒状的花蜜，是唯一没法把喙收在羽毛下休息的蜂鸟！
funFactEn: This hummingbird's bill is longer than its body for deep flowers — it can't tuck its bill under its feathers to sleep!

funFactZh: 印加燕鸥有两撇长长的白胡子，只在南美洲太平洋沿岸繁殖，看起来又严肃又滑稽！
funFactEn: Inca Terns sport long white “moustaches” and nest only along South America's Pacific coast — serious and silly at once!

funFactZh: 这种小鸟在南美洲城市和山地都很常见，歌声清脆，像随身带着一个小铃铛！
funFactEn: This little sparrow sings in cities and mountains across South America — like carrying a tiny bell!

funFactZh: 棕腹鱼狗是美洲最大的翠鸟之一，会像炮弹一样扎进水里抓鱼，溅起的水花比它还高！
funFactEn: One of the Americas' largest kingfishers — they dive like missiles and splash higher than their own size!

funFactZh: 灰冠鹤头顶有一撮金色的羽毛，像戴了一顶小皇冠；它们跳舞求偶时还会高高跳起来！
funFactEn: Grey Crowned Cranes wear a golden crown of feathers and leap high when they dance to impress a mate!

funFactZh: 翡翠鱼狗只有巴掌大，羽毛却闪着金属蓝绿色，像一颗会飞的小宝石！
funFactEn: This kingfisher is palm-sized with shiny blue-green feathers — like a flying jewel above the water!

funFactZh: 锤头鹳会筑一个比汽车还大的巢，雄鸟和雌鸟一起搬运树枝，像盖一座小鸟城堡！
funFactEn: Hamerkops build nests so huge both parents haul sticks — like building a bird castle!

funFactZh: 弯嘴犀鸟的喙像一把黄色的香蕉，但中间是空心的，所以并不重，飞起来很轻松！
funFactEn: The hornbill's yellow bill looks like a banana but is hollow and light — easy to fly with!

funFactZh: 红蜂虎成群在河岸上挖洞筑巢，空中捕捉蜜蜂前会在树枝上蹭掉蜂刺，聪明又勇敢！
funFactEn: These bee-eaters nest in riverbanks in crowds — they rub stingers off bees on a branch before eating!

funFactZh: 珍珠鸡身上有白色圆点，头顶光秃秃像戴了一顶小钢盔，跑起来像一群会叫的小足球！
funFactEn: Guineafowl wear white spots and a bare “helmet” head — running together they look like noisy little soccer balls!

funFactZh: 白脸树鸭的叫声像哨子，一群鸟一起叫就像在湿地里开小型音乐会！
funFactEn: Their whistles sound like tiny flutes — a flock together is a wetland concert!

funFactZh: 非洲水雉的脚趾特别长，能在睡莲叶上“走钢丝”，雄鸟负责孵蛋和带小鸟！
funFactEn: Huge toes let jacanas walk on lily pads like tightrope walkers — dads incubate eggs and raise chicks!

funFactZh: 灰蕉鹃的英文名意思是“走开鸟”，报警叫声像在喊“go away”，提醒同伴有危险！
funFactEn: Its English name comes from calls that sound like “go away” — a warning to friends when danger is near!

pinyin: nán fāng hóng qiǎo zhī què
funFactZh: 繁殖期的雄鸟变成鲜红色和黑色，像穿了一件小斗篷，在芦苇丛里跳来跳去吸引雌鸟！
funFactEn: Breeding males turn scarlet and black like tiny capes — they bounce in the reeds to impress mates!

funFactZh: 栗头丽椋鸟的羽毛闪着金属蓝、绿和橙，在阳光下像穿了一件会反光的演出服！
funFactEn: Superb Starlings shimmer metallic blue, green, and orange — like stage costumes in sunlight!

funFactZh: 埃及雁其实是雁形目里的“假鹅”，眼睛周围有一圈棕色“眼影”，看起来很有个性！
funFactEn: Despite the name it's more like a fancy sheldgoose — brown “eyeliner” makes it look very stylish!

funFactZh: 茶色蟆口鸱晚上张开大嘴捉飞蛾，白天却装成断树枝，连颜色都和树皮一模一样！
funFactEn: At night it gapes wide for moths; by day it pretends to be a broken branch matching the bark!

funFactZh: 雄鸟会用树枝搭一条“小隧道”，再捡蓝色瓶盖和羽毛装饰，像在开艺术展览吸引雌鸟！
funFactEn: Males build an avenue of sticks and decorate with blue treasures — like an art show for females!

pinyin: cǎi hóng xī mì yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 彩虹吸蜜鹦鹉的舌头像一把小刷子，专门用来舔花蜜；它们吵吵闹闹，是城市公园里的小明星！
funFactEn: Their brush-tongues lap up nectar — noisy, colourful stars of parks and gardens!

funFactZh: 新西兰隼是新西兰动作最快的猎手之一，能在树林里高速转弯追逐小鸟，像一架小战斗机！
funFactEn: NZ Falcons hunt at blistering speed through forests — twisting like tiny fighter jets!

funFactZh: 鹊鹅的脚只有半蹼，却能在洪泛平原上大步走动；它们是鹅类里很古老的“活化石亲戚”！
funFactEn: Half-webbed feet let them stride across floodplains — an ancient branch of the goose family tree!

funFactZh: 繁殖季节蓑颈白鹮的脖子会长出草一样的羽毛，像披了一条稻草围巾，特别好认！
funFactEn: In breeding season straw-like plumes grow on the neck — easy to spot in the flock!

funFactZh: 小蓝企鹅是世上最小的企鹅，只有兔子那么高；天黑时它们会排队摇摇摆摆回家，像穿燕尾服的小绅士！
funFactEn: The smallest penguins — about rabbit-sized — waddle home in lines after dark like tiny tuxedo guests!

pinyin: zǐ guān xī mì yīng wǔ
funFactZh: 这种小鹦鹉头顶有一抹紫色，喜欢成群在桉树上叽叽喳喳，像一串会飞的糖果！
funFactEn: A purple crown and chatty flocks in eucalyptus — like flying sweets in the treetops!

funFactZh: 澳洲钟鹊的歌声像许多种乐器合在一起，春天时雄鸟会站在树顶大声“独奏”宣告地盘！
funFactEn: Their song mixes whistles and clicks — in spring males carol from treetops to claim a home patch!

funFactZh: 噪矿吸蜜鸟会成群驱赶入侵自己花园的鸟，叫声又响又密，像一群小保安在巡逻！
funFactEn: Noisy Miners chase other birds from “their” gardens in loud gangs — tiny feathered security guards!

funFactZh: 雪鹀冬天羽毛雪白像小雪球，夏天换上棕色繁殖羽，像在雪地里玩换装游戏！
funFactEn: Winter plumage is snowy white; summer brings brown breeding clothes — a seasonal costume swap!

funFactZh: 雄鸟头上像戴着橙色和绿色的小王冠，潜水本领高强，在冰冷的海里找贝类当大餐！
funFactEn: Males wear orange and green “crowns” and dive in icy seas for shellfish feasts!

funFactZh: 厚嘴崖海鸦会用窄窄的悬崖台阶当“托儿所”，成千上万只鸟挤在一起，像黑白相间的地毯！
funFactEn: Murres pack cliff ledges into giant nurseries — a black-and-white living carpet!

funFactZh: 柳雷鸟冬天全身雪白藏在雪里，夏天换成斑驳的棕色，像会随季节换迷彩服的士兵！
funFactEn: Snow-white in winter and patchy brown in summer — seasonal camouflage experts!

funFactZh: 白鸥几乎全身纯白，像北极里的小雪花精灵，会跟着北极熊找剩下来的海豹大餐！
funFactEn: Almost pure white like Arctic snow sprites — they sometimes follow polar bears to leftovers!

funFactZh: 灰鹤迁徙时会排成巨大的“V”字或螺旋，叫声嘹亮，在欧洲湿地像举行空中游行！
funFactEn: Migrating flocks form huge V's or spirals — their calls are a parade over European wetlands!

funFactZh: 红隼能在空中停住不动，像被一根看不见的线吊着，下面的小老鼠一动就被它发现！
funFactEn: Kestrels hover on the wind like they're hanging from a string — spotting mice far below!

funFactZh: 黄喉蜂虎会把蜜蜂在树枝上蹭掉毒刺再吃，羽毛彩虹色，像会飞的糖果棒！
funFactEn: They rub stingers off bees before eating — rainbow feathers like flying candy sticks!

funFactZh: 雄鸟喉咙上有一块闪亮的蓝色“宝石”，在芦苇里跳来跳去展示，像在舞台上打领结！
funFactEn: Males flash a sapphire throat patch in the reeds — like bow ties on a tiny stage!

funFactZh: 雕鸮是世界上最大的猫头鹰之一，耳朵竖起像小角，夜里悄无声息地飞过树林捉老鼠！
funFactEn: Among the world's largest owls — ear tufts like tiny horns and silent night flights over forests!
